calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing Re: Petitioner'S Request That Gift Letter Constitutes Amendment To The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Elizabeth Button appeared via zoom for Alex D'Angelo (petitioner).
Lizabeth de Vries (GAL) appeared via zoom for Roger Henry Pedeupe.

Ms. Button stated that all the information was sent to the French relatives, they waived to appear, and that nobody has come forward to contest this matter. Ms. Button also stated she had no objections to Ms.De Vries fees. The matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee; Determining The Validity Of Trust Provisions; And F
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing Re: Petitioner'S Request That Gift Letter Constitutes Amendment To The Trust
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee; Determining The Validity Of Trust Provisions; And F
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee; Determining The Validity Of Trust Provisions; And F
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth Button for Alex D'Angelo, Petitioner.
Liza de Vries, Guardian Ad Litem for Roger Henry Pedeupe.

The court confirmed that proper notice was provided to interested parties. Ms. Button reported that she discovered a balloon mortgage payment of approximately $360,000 due on April 1, and stated home is the largest asset of the trust, and immediate appointment of a trustee is necessary to handle financial matters and prevent foreclosure. Ms. De Vries stated that, based on limited information, it appears necessary to have a temporary appointment to marshal assets and prevent foreclosure.

The court took the petition under submission with intent to grant to appointment of Alex D'Angelo as successor trustee. Trustee must post a $1.4 million bond before assuming duties. The court continues the remainder of the petition to March 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and defers ruling on whether the gift letter constitutes a trust amendment until the next hearing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee; Determining The Validity Of Trust Provisions; And F
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth M. Button for Alex D'Angelo, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court addressed issues with regards to notice of the petition for appointment of successor trustee, which had not been given to the settlor, currently in a nursing care facility, or to 17 additional relatives, some of whom live abroad. Counsel acknowledged the deficiencies and requested time to provide notice and address related concerns.

The court indicated a bond would be required and recommended appointing guardian ad litem for the settlor. Counsel agreed to file an ex parte petition for guardian ad litem and to submit a supplemental declaration regarding the trust's assets and the gift letter.

The court continued the matter to February 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow counsel to cure notice deficiencies.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
